item_matching: Use 5 items in listA and 7 items in listB to allow for distractors.
long_answer: IMPORTANT: The description must never include the answer or solution content.
Set description as setup/context only and task.prompt as the instruction only.
Do not repeat the same wording between description and task.prompt.
If task.sub_questions is not empty, labels must be sequential (a, b, c, ...) and marks must sum to the total question marks.
